item.title: Eicher Motors Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 Mar 2026
item.description: Eicher Motors Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 6,770.7, reflecting a 2.93% drop as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral headwinds. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Jindal Steel Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 Mar 2026
item.description: Jindal Steel Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,158.3, reflecting a 5.46% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral downturns. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Avenue Supermarts Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Avenue Supermarts Ltd (DMART) has witnessed a notable 13.47% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This surge accompanies a modest price gain and rising volumes, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Ortel Communications Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Ortel Communications Ltd (BZ series) witnessed a remarkable surge on 13 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit price limit of ₹1.54, marking a maximum daily gain of 4.76%. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying pressure amid subdued sector performance and a notable decline in investor participation, signalling a potential shift in market sentiment for the micro-cap media and entertainment stock. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Blue Star Ltd. Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Blue Star Ltd., a mid-cap player in the Electronics & Appliances sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent price decline, the stock’s derivatives market reveals increased participation, suggesting evolving directional bets amid sectoral and broader market pressures. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: ABB India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: ABB India Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, reflecting heightened market activity and shifting investor sentiment. The stock’s recent performance, coupled with increased volume and rising investor participation, suggests a strong directional bias among traders, positioning ABB as a key focus in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd (symbol: OLAELEC) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks on 13 Mar 2026, registering a total traded volume exceeding 1.52 crore shares. Despite this surge in activity, the stock continued its downward trajectory, closing near its 52-week low and underperforming key moving averages, signalling persistent selling pressure and investor caution in the small-cap automobile sector. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd Sees High-Value Trading Amidst Consecutive Declines
item.description: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd, a prominent large-cap private sector bank, witnessed significant trading activity on 13 Mar 2026, registering one of the highest value turnovers in the equity market. Despite this liquidity surge, the stock has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting a complex interplay of investor sentiment and technical pressures. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: HMT Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: HMT Ltd, a small-cap player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, witnessed a robust rally on 13 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 5.0% gain. The stock’s surge was driven by intense buying interest, outpacing sector and benchmark indices despite a backdrop of falling investor participation and regulatory trading restrictions. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: IDFC First Bank Sees Heavy Volume Amid Continued Downtrend and Investor Caution
item.description: IDFC First Bank Ltd., a mid-cap player in the private sector banking space, witnessed one of the highest trading volumes on 13 Mar 2026, with nearly 1.9 crore shares exchanging hands. Despite this surge in activity, the stock continued its downward trajectory, falling 2.89% intraday and underperforming both its sector and the broader Sensex. This article analyses the volume dynamics, price action, and technical signals shaping investor sentiment around the stock. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Cotspin Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Laxmi Cotspin Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, witnessed intense selling pressure on 13 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit price limit. The stock closed at ₹12.93, down 0.84% from the previous close, reflecting panic selling and unfilled supply that capped any recovery attempts during the trading session. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.04% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning despite a modest decline in its share price. This surge in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and sector dynamics, offers valuable insights into potential directional bets and market sentiment for this large-cap heavy electrical equipment player. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Unilever Ltd Sees Surge in Call Option Activity Amid Bullish Sentiment
item.description: Hindustan Unilever Ltd (HINDUNILVR), a stalwart in the FMCG sector, has witnessed a notable surge in call option trading activity ahead of the 30 March 2026 expiry, signalling heightened bullish positioning despite the stock’s recent technical challenges and a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Syngene International Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Syngene International Ltd (SYNGENE) witnessed a significant 20.6% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment on 13 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market interest and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its healthcare sector peers and broader indices, reflecting renewed investor optimism despite a prevailing strong sell mojo grade. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Interglobe Aviation Ltd Sees High-Value Trading Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Interglobe Aviation Ltd, the parent company of IndiGo, witnessed significant trading activity on 13 March 2026, with over 10.8 lakh shares exchanging hands and a total traded value exceeding ₹449 crore. Despite this high value turnover, the stock experienced a notable decline, reflecting growing investor caution amid a broader sector downturn and deteriorating technical indicators. Time: 14 minutes ago
